===================
===================
=== info70481.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
July 4, 1981
National Exhibition Centre
Birmingham, England
2013 Remaster 

Audience analog master tape>CD-R>EQ'd with AmadeusPro>xAct>Flac

Found this gem of a show in my master tape collection.I had some dealings with a taper in Europe about 10 or 11 years ago who taped many early 80's Dylan shows. He put many of them on CD-R for me in exchange for some previously uncirculated 1974 shows I discovered at the time. I spread them around pretty well back then. But here's a nice, slightly EQ'ed, version for those who don't have this show or who need/want an upgrade. Samples supplied.Enjoy!

CD1
Saved 
I Believe In You
Like A Rolling Stone
Till I Get It Right (Regina McCrary vocals) 
Man Gave Names To All The Animals
Maggie's Farm
Simple Twist Of Fate
Girl Of The North Country
Ballad Of A Thin Man
Dead Man, Dead Man
Forever Young
Slow Train
Walk Around Heaven All Day (Carolyn Dennis vocals) 
Lenny Bruce
All Along The Watchtower

CD2
What Can I Do For You?
Mr. Tambourine Man
Solid Rock
Just Like A Woman
Heart Of Mine
Barbara Allen 
Masters Of War
When You Gonna Wake Up?
In The Summertime
In The Garden
Blowin' In The Wind
Don't Think Twice, It's All Right
Knockin' On Heaven's Door
